title: Artefact Node Payload
description: Payload of an `Artefact` graph node in `context/_store/ontology.db`. Ingested by the PostToolUse hook from a tool envelope's `data.artefact_metadata` field. Replaces the deprecated file-on-disk `.meta.json` sidecar (see `vision/specs/03-sidecar-metadata.md`); the `artifact_driver` / `driver_pointer` pair points to the bytes via the driver registry instead.

artefact_path.description: OPTIONAL legacy field. Path of the artefact relative to the repository root. Prefer `driver_pointer` for new code.

content_type.description: MIME type of the artifact. Examples: `audio/mpeg`, `audio/wav`, `application/pdf`, `image/png`.

sha256.description: Hex digest (lowercase) of the artifact bytes.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the artifact was written.

session_id.description: Opaque session id from the workflow runner.

derived_from.description: Graph node IDs the artifact derives from. Each becomes a DERIVED_FROM edge in the ontology graph.

satisfies_phase.description: OPTIONAL. Workflow phase id this artifact completes. Emits a SATISFIES_PHASE edge when set.

artifact_driver.description: OPTIONAL until v1. Key into `context/_drivers/REGISTRY` selecting how to fetch the bytes (e.g. `fs`, `repo`, `s3`).

driver_pointer.description: OPTIONAL until v1. Driver-specific pointer the chosen driver uses to resolve the bytes (e.g. an `fs` path, an S3 key).
